device_type: automated agitated-saline contrast injection system with single-use contrast injection tubing set

device_profile.device_type: automated agitated-saline contrast injection system with single-use contrast injection tubing set
device_profile.intended_purpose: The Bubble Study System is used in conjunction with Disposable Masks and Disposable Contrast Injection Tubing Set for the preparation and injection of agitated saline during bubble study procedures for transthoracic echocardiographic contrast imaging or contrast-enhanced transcranial Doppler ultrasound imaging. The NIBP module monitors patient pulse and non-invasive blood pressure.
device_profile.target_population: Adults aged 18-75 years, both sexes. Patients clinically suspected of right-to-left shunt who can complete contrast echocardiography or transcranial Doppler ultrasound assessment and can cooperate with Valsalva maneuver.
device_profile.intended_user: Trained and experienced medical staff with professional certification. Specifically: cardiac ultrasound physicians for c-TTE; neurology ultrasound physicians for c-TCD.
device_profile.anatomical_site: Cardiac: right atrium, interatrial septum (foramen ovale) for transthoracic echocardiographic contrast imaging (c-TTE). Cerebral: middle cerebral artery (MCA) for contrast-enhanced transcranial Doppler ultrasound imaging (c-TCD). Intravenous administration via elbow vein.
device_profile.mode_of_action: Automated preparation and injection of agitated saline contrast agent to support ultrasound bubble-study detection and grading of right-to-left shunt.

1 Summary.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §1 Summary of a Clinical Evaluation Report. RULES: (1) NEVER introduce new evidence or data here — only summarize what follows; (2) Include: device name, intended purpose, evaluation type, key evidence sources, and overall conclusion; (3) Keep length between 200-800 words; (4) Ensure conclusion strength matches §5 exactly — do not strengthen or weaken; (5) Use present tense; (6) No tables in this section.

0 Scope.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §0 Scope & Introduction. RULES: (1) Define the scope and objectives of the clinical evaluation; (2) Identify the device name, model, and manufacturer; (3) Reference applicable regulations (MDR Art 61) and standards; (4) State the evaluation approach (literature-only / clinical investigation / combined); (5) Keep concise.

2.1 Device Description.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §2 Scope / Device Description. RULES: (1) Device identity MUST include: name, model/variant, EMDN code, MDR Class+Rule, intended purpose — this is NON-NEGOTIABLE; (2) If multiple variants exist, describe EACH with functional differences; (3) Include: contraindications, warnings, precautions, intended users, intended environment; (4) Describe previous generations and design evolution; (5) Include marketing history (authorized countries, sales data if available); (6) Use present tense; (7) Passive voice acceptable for technical descriptions; (8) Sentence length 22-32 words average; (9) Every Table/Figure must be referenced in text.

2.2 Intended Purpose.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §2 Intended Purpose & Indications. RULES: (1) EXPLICITLY state intended medical indication and purpose; (2) List ALL indications and contra-indications; (3) Define target population (age, condition, anatomical location); (4) Define intended users (clinical specialty, training level); (5) Ensure 100% consistency with IFU — any deviation is a Blocker defect.

3 SOTA.writer_guard_prompt:
You are writing §3 Clinical Background / SOTA. CRITICAL RULES: (1) MUST answer three core questions before writing: Q1=What is the gold standard? Q2=What is the safety risk differential vs gold standard? Q3=Is this unmet need or optimization?; (2) MUST include Safety and Performance Endpoints table with SOTA benchmark values — this is NON-NEGOTIABLE; (3) Disease epidemiology MUST include prevalence/incidence with citations; (4) Alternative treatments MUST cover all categories: pharmacological, surgical, interventional, other devices; (5) Clinical guidelines MUST be cited with year and issuing body; (6) Known hazards MUST be listed; (7) SOTA conclusions MUST explicitly frame the evidentiary questions for §4; (8) Use present tense for disease description, past tense for study history; (9) Paragraph length 25-40 words.

---

You are writing §4.1 Type of Evaluation. RULES: (1) EXPLICITLY state the evaluation type: literature-only / clinical investigation / combined; (2) JUSTIFY why this type is appropriate for the device's risk class and novelty; (3) REFERENCE the Clinical Evaluation Plan; (4) If clinical investigation path: mention study design, population, endpoints; (5) If literature-only path: explain why sufficient published evidence exists; (6) Keep concise — this is a declarative section.

4 Device Under Evaluation.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §4.2 Demonstration of Equivalence. CRITICAL RULES: (1) FIRST sentence must declare: 'Equivalence is [claimed / not claimed]'; (2) If CLAIMED: MUST include three-dimension comparison table (Technical / Biological / Clinical) per MDR Art 61; (3) If CLAIMED: intended purpose MUST be IDENTICAL — this is NON-NEGOTIABLE; (4) Every 'Different' or 'Similar' entry MUST have impact justification ending with 'does not affect clinical safety and performance because...'; (5) MUST reference §2 device specs ≥3 times; (6) Equivalent device MUST be EU-authorized (CE marked); (7) If NOT claimed: MUST include Similar Devices table for market positioning; (8) Use standard wording: 'Substantially equivalent' / 'Equivalent with minor differences' / 'Not equivalent'; (9) Reference MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev.4 and MDCG 2020-5 in opening.

4.7 GSPR Analysis.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §4 Evidence Analysis (the largest and most critical section). ABSOLUTE RULES: (1) GSPR analysis MUST cover GSPR 1, 6, 8 minimum; (2) EACH GSPR MUST cite ≥2 evidence types (standard, pre-clinical, clinical, literature, vigilance); (3) EACH GSPR MUST follow 5-paragraph structure: Requirement → Sources → Summary → Analysis → Conclusion; (4) Benefit-risk analysis MUST quantify benefits AND risks with rates/percentages; (5) Vigilance data MUST cover ≥2 databases (MHRA+BfArM+FDA minimum); (6) Literature search MUST document: databases, terms, inclusion/exclusion, dates, executors; (7) ALL numerical data MUST be consistent across §4 subsections — cross-check before finalizing; (8) Standards conformance table MUST list all applicable harmonized standards; (9) Use past tense for study results, present tense for analysis conclusions; (10) Sentence length 25-30 words for analysis paragraphs.

5 Conclusions.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §6 Benefit-Risk Analysis. CRITICAL RULES: (1) QUANTIFY all benefits and risks with rates/percentages where possible; (2) Document ALL risk control measures from ISO 14971; (3) Assess RESIDUAL risk after controls; (4) Provide EXPLICIT overall benefit-risk conclusion using 'acceptable when weighed against the benefits' phrasing; (5) Reference MDR Annex I GSPR requirements.

6 Next Evaluation.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §5 Conclusions. CRITICAL RULES: (1) MUST contain EXACTLY these 6 elements: Limitations + Overall Conformity + Safety + Performance + Benefit-Risk + Next Evaluation; (2) EACH conclusion MUST be traceable to §4 evidence — if you cannot find the evidence, DO NOT write the conclusion; (3) NEVER introduce new evidence here; (4) Conclusion strength MUST match evidence: strong evidence → 'confirms/demonstrates', moderate → 'indicates/supports', weak → 'is consistent with'; (5) EACH sentence = ONE judgment only — no clause stacking; (6) Use present tense; (7) Keep 150-300 words total; (8) Industry standard limitation wording is acceptable: 'The limitations...unpublished documents about negative result cannot be examined.'; (9) Benefit-risk conclusion MUST use 'acceptable when weighed against the benefits' phrasing.

7 Qualification.writer_guard_prompt: You are compiling Annexes. RULES: (1) Literature List: MUST include ALL literature cited in §4.4/§4.5 with full bibliographic details; (2) Search Strategy Annex: include screenshots or full text of database searches; (3) Equivalence Table Annex: if §4.2 has summary, Annex has FULL detailed version; (4) Standards List: all standards from §4.3.1 with complete designations; (5) Vigilance Records: screenshots of database searches; (6) CRITICAL: every Annex MUST be referenced ≥1 time in main text — orphan annexes are NOT allowed; (7) Number Annexes sequentially (Annex 1, Annex 2...); (8) Each Annex must have a title page.

Annexes.writer_guard_prompt: You are writing §6-§9 Administrative Sections. RULES: (1) §6 Next Evaluation: specify date or trigger condition; (2) §7 Qualification: list evaluator names, titles, qualifications; (3) §8 Declaration: include conflict of interest statement; (4) §9 Signatures: include approval dates and signature placeholders; (5) These sections are template-driven — ensure no template placeholders remain (TM-001 risk); (6) Keep minimal — administrative only, no technical content.

templates.writer.gspr_analysis: Regarding {gspr_id} ({requirement_summary}), the available evidence includes {sources}. The analysis demonstrates that {reasoning}. Therefore, the device {compliance_judgment}.
templates.writer.benefit_risk_narrative: The benefit-risk profile of {device_name} is assessed across {ledger_count} dimensions. {favorable_count} dimensions are favorable, {uncertain_count} uncertain. The overall profile is {overall_balance} with {uncertainty_count} residual uncertainties.
templates.writer.conclusion_guard: Conclusion wording is constrained to {allowed_strength}. Prohibited wording: {prohibited_terms}. Basis: {guard_reason}.
templates.writer.sota_context: The SOTA benchmark for {endpoint} is {benchmark_value} (confidence: {confidence}). {device_name} {comparison_result} this benchmark based on {evidence_basis}.
templates.writer.gap_statement: Evidence gap for {claim_id}: {gap_description}. Impact: {impact_level}. Recommended PMCF measure: {pmcf_measure} with target timeline {timeline}.
templates.gap.insufficient_evidence: Evidence gap for {claim_id}: {gap_description}. Current evidence: {current_count} records ({current_weight}). Recommended: {pmcf_measure} within {timeline}.
templates.gap.missing_endpoint: No SOTA benchmark available for {endpoint}. Suggested clinical alternatives: {alternatives}. If no alternative is clinically equivalent, flag as PMCF requirement.
templates.gap.missing_fulltext: Full text not available for {evidence_count} records ({evidence_ids}). These records cannot support pivotal conclusions. Recommended: acquire full text or downgrade to supportive only.
templates.gap.follow_up_insufficient: Available follow-up ({available_follow_up}) is inadequate for {device_class} device expected surveillance period ({expected_follow_up}). Gap: {gap_years} years. Recommended: PMCF study with minimum {required_follow_up} follow-up.
templates.gap.population_mismatch: Study population ({study_population}) does not fully match IFU target population ({ifu_population}). Transferability requires documented justification. Without justification, evidence weight is downgraded.
templates.gap.sample_size_insufficient: Sample size ({actual_n}) below threshold for {device_class} ({required_n}). Statistical power analysis required. If power is inadequate, evidence can only support background/risk context.
templates.gap.gspr_gap: No clinical evidence mapped to {gspr_id} ({gspr_requirement}). This GSPR requirement must be addressed through {source_type} or flagged as a PMCF gap.
templates.gap.equivalence_gap: Equivalence argument for {device_name} vs {equivalent_device} is incomplete. Missing: {missing_dimensions}. Until all three dimensions (technical, biological, clinical) are documented, equivalence cannot be claimed per MDCG 2020-5.
templates.nb_defense.DO-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify all annexes are populated with actual data, not placeholder tables. Search protocol must include PRISMA flow. Evidence tables must be complete.
templates.nb_defense.GS-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify every clinical data item in §4.7 is explicitly linked to a GSPR number. Create a GSPR-to-evidence cross-reference table.
templates.nb_defense.LB-001_precheck: Pre-check: cross-reference CER §2.1 device description against IFU text. Verify device name, intended purpose, contraindications, and technical specs match exactly.
templates.nb_defense.EV-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify literature appraisal methodology is documented with defined criteria. Each evidence item must have: study design, population, endpoint, results, quality score, limitations.
templates.nb_defense.PM-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify PMCF plan has: specific objectives, measurable endpoints, target sample size, timeline, and method for each identified gap.
templates.nb_defense.EQ-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify equivalence comparison covers all three MDCG 2020-5 dimensions (technical, biological, clinical). Each difference must have an impact assessment.
templates.nb_defense.CL-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify claim conclusions do not exceed evidence strength. Cross-reference claim strength against evidence weight, sample size, and follow-up adequacy.

DO-001.defect_name: 器械描述缺陷 / Device Description Incomplete

phase_1_document: 提取当前 CER §1 Device Description 全文
对照技术文档（设计输入、风险管理、IFU）核对规格参数完整性
列出所有缺失项：尺寸/材料/能量参数/软件版本/配套附件
phase_2_enrich: 补充型号差异矩阵（Model-to-Model Comparison Table）
添加设计原理图/工作流程图引用（图号+版本）
明确关键性能参数（KPP）及其与宣称的关联
phase_3_validate: 交叉验证：设备描述 ↔ IFU ↔ 标签 ↔ 风险管理文件
确认所有引用的型号/规格在技术上文件中有对应证据
运行 DO-001 自检清单（见 verification_checklist）

verification_checklist: [ ] 所有上市型号均已在 §1.1 中列出并区分
[ ] 每个型号的尺寸/材料/能量参数完整且带单位
[ ] 软件版本号（如适用）已明确标注
[ ] 设计原理/工作机制有图示或流程说明
[ ] 与 IFU 中的描述无矛盾
[ ] 引用的技术文档编号和版本号正确且可追踪

cross_round_strategy.r1_typical: NB 指出描述缺失项，要求补充型号差异/设计原理
cross_round_strategy.r2_risk: 若仅补充文字未提供技术文档引用，NB 会追问 'where is the evidence?'
cross_round_strategy.r2_recommended: 同时补充文字描述 + 引用具体技术文件编号 + 提供文件摘要或摘录
cross_round_strategy.r3_persistent: 若涉及软件算法，需额外提供算法验证报告引用（BSI 常见追问）
cross_round_strategy.escalation_pattern: TÜV SÜD 倾向于在同一 DR 编号下追加追问；BSI 可能在不同 Review Dimension 中分别提问

expected_nb_response.satisfied: NB 接受补充，转向其他缺陷或关闭审评维度
expected_nb_response.partial: NB 接受部分补充，但指出新增描述与其他章节矛盾（触发 DT-001）
expected_nb_response.rejected: NB 认为补充仍不充分，要求提供原始设计文档或第三方验证报告

GS-001.defect_name: GSPR 覆盖不全 / GSPR Coverage Incomplete

phase_1_audit: 获取最新版 GSPR 清单（MDR Annex I）
逐条核对：CER 中是否引用了每个 GSPR 的符合性证据
标记缺失项和 'N/A' 标注不当的条目
phase_2_map: 构建 GSPR → 证据映射表（Evidence Mapping Table）
对每条 GSPR，明确：适用性(Yes/No/N/A)、证据来源、证据编号、CER 引用位置
对标注 N/A 的条目，提供充分的理由说明
phase_3_integrate: 将 GSPR 映射表作为 CER Annex 或独立文件提交
在 CER 正文中增加 GSPR 引用锚点（如 'See GSPR Table entry GSPR-9.2'）
更新 DoC（符合性声明）确保与 GSPR 映射一致

verification_checklist: [ ] MDR Annex I 所有 GSPR 条目均已覆盖（或明确标注 N/A 并附理由）
[ ] 每条 GSPR 均有对应的证据文件引用
[ ] GSPR 映射表版本号与 CER 版本号一致
[ ] DoC 中的标准引用与 GSPR 映射一致
[ ] N/A 标注均有书面理由，且理由符合 MDCG 指导原则

cross_round_strategy.r1_typical: NB 指出特定 GSPR 条目缺失引用（如 GSPR-9、GSPR-14）
cross_round_strategy.r2_risk: 仅补充引用但未更新 DoC，NB 会指出 'DoC does not match GSPR table'
cross_round_strategy.r2_recommended: 同步更新 GSPR 映射表 + DoC + CER 引用，三位一体
cross_round_strategy.r3_persistent: 若 NB 质疑 N/A 理由，需提供行业惯例或类似产品的对比说明
cross_round_strategy.escalation_pattern: BSI 的 Technical Review Dimension 和 Main Job Dimension 可能分别提出 GSPR 问题

expected_nb_response.satisfied: NB 接受 GSPR 映射表，关闭相关缺陷
expected_nb_response.partial: NB 接受映射表但指出某些 GSPR 的证据等级不足（如仅引用内部测试而非标准测试）
expected_nb_response.rejected: NB 认为 N/A 理由不充分，要求提供替代符合性证据

deerflow_injection.auto_prompt_prefix: 【GSPR 自检】在输出 CER 前，强制要求：1) GSPR 映射表完整性 2) 每条 GSPR 有证据引用 3) DoC 与映射表一致性
deerflow_injection.output_enforcement: 必须生成 GSPR Evidence Mapping Table 作为 Annex；正文必须引用映射表

real_case_references: BSI 典型表述: 'The documents have been found to be non-compliant with the requirements of 2017/745 MDR Chapter VI'
常见追问: 'GSPR-14.2 ( usability ) not adequately addressed in CER'

EV-001.defect_name: 临床证据不足 / Insufficient Clinical Evidence

phase_1_assess: 评估当前临床证据缺口：缺失的是安全性数据还是性能数据？
区分证据类型需求：文献数据 / 等同器械数据 / 自有临床数据 / PMCF 数据
确定目标人群和适应症是否均有足够证据支撑
phase_2_source: 若为文献缺口：扩展检索策略（增加数据库/调整检索式/延长时限）
若为等同器械缺口：补充等同器械的临床数据引用或扩大等同器械范围
若为自有数据缺口：评估是否可补充回顾性研究数据或加速 PMCF 启动
若完全无临床数据：启动临床评估豁免论证（仅适用于低风险且已有充分文献）
phase_3_document: 在 CER §5 中增加证据层级说明（Evidence Hierarchy）
补充数据汇总表（Clinical Data Summary Table）：来源、样本量、随访期、关键终点
更新获益风险分析，确保新增证据已纳入 BR 评估

verification_checklist: [ ] 每个适应症声明均有对应的临床证据支撑
[ ] 安全性声明（如 '无严重不良事件'）有数据支撑
[ ] 性能声明（如 '95% 成功率'）有定量数据
[ ] 文献检索报告覆盖至少 2 个主要医学数据库
[ ] 等同器械数据（如使用）有完整的等同性论证
[ ] PMCF 计划与证据缺口对应（如计划收集缺失的数据）

cross_round_strategy.r1_typical: NB 指出 'insufficient clinical evidence'，可能具体说明缺哪类数据
cross_round_strategy.r2_risk: 补充文献但 NB 认为文献质量低（非同行评审、样本量小、随访短）
cross_round_strategy.r2_recommended: 补充高质量文献 + 提供文献质量评估表（如 GRADE 或自建标准）
cross_round_strategy.r3_persistent: 若 NB 质疑等同器械数据适用性，需补充差异分析并论证差异无临床影响
cross_round_strategy.escalation_pattern: TÜV SÜD 可能在 R1→R3 中逐步加码证据要求；BSI 的 Clinical Dimension 可能独立发补

expected_nb_response.satisfied: NB 认为证据充分，接受临床评估结论
expected_nb_response.partial: NB 接受部分证据但要求补充特定人群（如儿童、孕妇）的数据
expected_nb_response.rejected: NB 认为证据等级不足，要求提供临床试验数据或拒绝认证

deerflow_injection.auto_prompt_prefix: 【临床证据自检】在输出 CER §5 前，强制验证：1) 每句声明有证据 2) 证据质量分级 3) 缺口有 PMCF 计划覆盖
deerflow_injection.output_enforcement: 必须包含 Clinical Data Summary Table；每行证据标注来源和样本量

real_case_references: TÜV SÜD: 'The clinical evidence provided is insufficient to support the safety and performance claims'
BSI: 'Justifying the lack of a Post-Market Clinical Surveillance Study is not sufficient for high-risk devices'

CL-001.defect_name: 临床数据质量缺陷 / Clinical Data Quality Issues

phase_1_diagnose: 识别数据质量问题的具体维度：样本量不足 / 随访缺失 / 终点定义不清 / 统计方法不当 / 伦理审批缺失
评估问题是否可通过补充文件解决（如补充伦理批件）还是需要重新分析数据
phase_2_remediate: 样本量不足：补充更多病例或合并多中心数据
随访缺失：补充随访计划说明，解释失访原因及影响评估
终点定义不清：明确定义主要/次要终点，引用标准临床终点定义
统计方法不当：补充统计分析计划（SAP）或重新进行统计分析
伦理审批缺失：补充伦理委员会批准文件和知情同意书模板
phase_3_present: 在 CER 中增加数据质量说明章节
提供数据完整性矩阵（Data Completeness Matrix）
更新获益风险分析，纳入数据质量限制的影响

verification_checklist: [ ] 所有临床数据均有伦理审批文件
[ ] 主要终点和次要终点有明确定义
[ ] 统计分析计划（SAP）与报告一致
[ ] 失访率低于可接受阈值（通常 <20%）且有说明
[ ] 数据收集表单（CRF）有版本控制
[ ] 数据质量审计报告（如适用）已提供

cross_round_strategy.r1_typical: NB 指出 CSR 质量不足或随访数据缺失
cross_round_strategy.r2_risk: 仅补充文字说明未提供原始数据或审计报告
cross_round_strategy.r2_recommended: 补充原始数据摘要 + 数据质量评估 + 缺失数据影响分析
cross_round_strategy.r3_persistent: 若涉及 GCP 合规性质疑，需提供监查报告或第三方审计
cross_round_strategy.escalation_pattern: BSI Clinical Dimension 对数据质量要求严格，可能要求 ISO 14155 合规证明

expected_nb_response.satisfied: NB 接受数据质量改进，关闭缺陷
expected_nb_response.partial: NB 接受部分改进但要求补充特定文档（如 SAP 修订版）
expected_nb_response.rejected: NB 认为数据质量问题影响结论可靠性，要求重新进行临床研究

deerflow_injection.auto_prompt_prefix: 【临床数据质量自检】验证：1) 伦理文件完整 2) 终点定义清晰 3) 统计方法恰当 4) 失访有说明

LB-001.defect_name: 标签/说明书问题 / Labeling/IFU Deficiencies

phase_1_audit: 获取最新版 IFU 和标签样本
对照 MDR Annex I GSPR-23 和 ISO 15223-1 核对信息要求
识别缺失项：禁忌症、警告、注意事项、副作用、存储条件、符号说明
phase_2_enrich: 补充所有 GSPR-23 要求的要素
增加特定人群警告（孕妇、儿童、老年、免疫抑制患者）
确保 IFU 中的性能声明与 CER 临床证据一致
添加 UDl 相关信息（如适用）
phase_3_validate: 交叉验证：IFU ↔ CER ↔ 风险管理文件
进行可用性评估（Usability Evaluation）确认信息可理解性
更新标签规格说明和版本控制

verification_checklist: [ ] IFU 包含所有 GSPR-23 要求的要素
[ ] 禁忌症和警告信息与 CER 安全性数据一致
[ ] 性能声明不超过 CER 临床证据支持的范围
[ ] 符号符合 ISO 15223-1 或已提供符号说明

RM-001.defect_name: 风险管理不足 / Risk Management File Incomplete

frequency.note: Present in taxonomy but no direct hits in 64-record sample

phase_1_audit: 评估风险管理文件（ISO 14971）完整性
检查：风险分析 / 风险评价 / 风险控制 / 残余风险评估 / 风险管理报告
识别缺失：危险源未识别 / 控制措施不充分 / 残余风险未评估
phase_2_enrich: 补充所有识别的危险源（Hazard Identification）
验证风险控制措施的有效性（如验证报告、测试结果）
评估残余风险的可接受性
更新风险管理报告，确保与 CER 和 IFU 一致
phase_3_validate: 交叉验证：风险管理文件 ↔ CER BR 分析 ↔ IFU 警告
确认所有 IFU 警告在风险管理文件中有对应的风险-控制记录
验证风险可接受性标准与行业惯例一致

verification_checklist: [ ] 所有已知危险源均已识别
[ ] 每项风险均有控制措施和验证
[ ] 残余风险已评估且可接受
[ ] 风险管理文件与 CER BR 分析一致
[ ] IFU 所有警告在风险管理文件中有对应记录
[ ] 风险管理报告已更新并签署

cross_round_strategy.escalation_pattern: 风险管理缺陷常与 BR-001 并发，需同步解决

BC-001.defect_name: 生物相容性评估缺陷 / Biocompatibility Evaluation Insufficient

frequency.note: Present in taxonomy but no direct hits in 64-record sample

phase_1_audit: 评估生物相容性评估报告完整性
检查：材料清单 / 接触类型和持续时间分类 / 测试项目 / 标准符合性
识别缺失：未测试材料 / 过时标准 / 缺失生物学终点
phase_2_test: 补充缺失的生物相容性测试（按 ISO 10993-1 生物学评价框架）
更新材料清单，确保所有与人体接触的材料均有评估
使用最新版 ISO 10993 系列标准
对不可测试材料提供论证（如文献数据、等同器械数据）
phase_3_report: 编写完整生物相容性评估报告（Biological Evaluation Report）
提供测试样品与上市产品的等同性说明
在 CER 中引用生物相容性评估报告

verification_checklist: [ ] 所有与人体接触的材料均已评估
[ ] 接触类型和持续时间分类正确（ISO 10993-1）
[ ] 测试项目覆盖所有必要的生物学终点
[ ] 使用最新版 ISO 10993 标准
[ ] 测试样品与上市产品等同
[ ] 对未测试材料有充分论证

cross_round_strategy.r2_recommended: 提供最新测试报告 + 生物学评价表 + 材料清单
cross_round_strategy.r3_persistent: 若 NB 质疑测试样品代表性，需提供样品-上市产品等同性说明
cross_round_strategy.escalation_pattern: 生物相容性缺陷在植入器械中尤为关键，NB 可能要求独立实验室测试
